signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Undershot 2.4% Forecast) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, below market expectations of 2.4%, with core inflation easing to 2.2% from 2.3%; data released April 2 per official statistics.[1][2] This undershoot amid Iran war-driven oil surges (petroleum +10.4% MoM) temper

signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow upgrade, targeting 100-150 millisecond transaction finality, was confirmed via a successful governance vote, strengthening Solana's position as a high-speed layer-1 blockchain amid strong network activity like $57B DEX volume in March.[2]

signals.headline: Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad Collapsed Without Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad Collapsed Without Deal | YES | HIGH confidence**
After 21 hours of negotiations, the U.S.-Iran peace talks ended without reaching agreement, with nuclear weapons development as the primary sticking point[7]. President Trump stated that "most points were agreed to, but the only point that really mattered, NUCLEAR, was not"[4].

signals.headline: Two-Week Ceasefire Remains Fragile but Holding | PARTIAL | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Two-Week Ceasefire Remains Fragile but Holding | PARTIAL | MED confidence**
The two-week ceasefire agreed to on April 8 technically remains in place[3], though negotiations have stalled. Trump cautioned Iran against charging tolls through the Strait of Hormuz and threatened "larger" attacks if terms aren't met[3].

signals.headline: House Oversight subpoenas AG Pam Bondi to testify on Epstein files handling | NO (no Elon Musk involvement) | HIGH confi
signals.raw:
House Oversight subpoenas AG Pam Bondi to testify on Epstein files handling | NO (no Elon Musk involvement) | HIGH confidence** [1]

House Oversight Chair James Comer (R-Ky.) issued a subpoena Tuesday demanding AG Pam Bondi testify before the committee on her management of Epstein-related documents, following a bipartisan vote and her prior refusal to answer questions in a House Judiciary hearing.

signals.headline: Bank of Korea Holds Rates Steady at 2
signals.raw:
Bank of Korea Holds Rates Steady at 2.5% (7th Consecutive Month) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Unanimous BOK decision on April 10 flagged inflation exceeding prior 2.2% forecast due to oil/won weakness (KRW ~1520/USD), but no change signaled amid growth below 2%; aligns with March data and boosts easing odds in prediction markets.[5][6] No newer confirmations post-April 10 as of now.[1][2]
